'''竏喩-ng-b-y''' ('''kagangbeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wemble|wemble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wemble|wemble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喩-ng-b-y
|-
! Lemma
| kagangbeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigangbeyoko|thigangbeyoko]] || [[word:jigangbeyoko|jigangbeyoko]] || [[word:shigangbeyoko|shigangbeyoko]] || [[word:kigangbeyoko|kigangbeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugangbeyoko|thuthugangbeyoko]] || [[word:jujugangbeyoko|jujugangbeyoko]] || [[word:shushugangbeyoko|shushugangbeyoko]] || [[word:kukugangbeyoko|kukugangbeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦgangbeyoko|thﾃｦgangbeyoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦgangbeyoko|jﾃｦgangbeyoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦgangbeyoko|shﾃｦgangbeyoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦgangbeyoko|kﾃｦgangbeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
